summary: Read-only release readiness evaluation for agent-layer source and readers.
meaning: Use this pack when an agent must judge whether a bounded change has enough checks, evidence, and reader freshness to be treated as release-ready.

notes: May run release checks and inspect artifacts.
Must hand off if readiness requires source mutation.

projection_hints: Suitable for evaluator specializations that score readiness without editing.
Projection should prefer validation and evidence tools over write tools.
stop_lines: Do not change source state through this pack.
Do not promote local readiness judgment into eval doctrine.
